case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK VS. SEDAT TEMEL ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-17-2021 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT TEMEL, SEDAT DOES 1 TO 20 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-21-2021
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK
NON SERVICE REPORT FOR DEFENDANT SADAR TEMEL (TRANSACTION ID # 200025674) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200034306)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-17-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
